enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the singers of the song Aathichudi?

The song is sung by Dinesh Kanakaratnam and Vijay Antony.

What is the release year of the movie TN 07 AL 4777?

The movie was released in the year 2009.

Who are the lead actors in the movie TN 07 AL 4777?

The lead roles are played by Pasupathy and Simran.

What is the mood of the song Aathichudi?

The song has an energetic and upbeat mood.

Who composed the music for the song Aathichudi?

The music was composed by Vijay Antony.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Aathichudi from the movie TN 07 AL 4777, released in 2009, features the lead actors Pasupathy and Simran. Composed by Vijay Antony and sung by Dinesh Kanakaratnam and Vijay Antony, this track is a vibrant and energetic number. The song's dynamic beats and lively rhythm make it a perfect addition to party playlists. It captures the essence of celebration and youthful exuberance, resonating with audiences of all ages.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aathichudi from the movie TN 07 AL 4777 is a high-energy track that showcases the vibrant beats of Vijay Antony and the dynamic vocals of Dinesh Kanakaratnam. This song perfectly encapsulates the lively and upbeat mood of the film. Dive into this electrifying number and experience the pulse of Tamil cinema music.
